2142830.name: the hardest game in the universe 2-DLC 1
2142830.description:
A new mode, new levels, new style, new difficulty

-new gameplay
-new phases
-new soundtrack
-new Difficulty in main game


A fully engaged mode, styled after old games


Original normal mode =The base game's normal mode, with 3 new stages and new enemies

Original impossible =The same mode as the base game, with increased difficulty and speed

Black in white-A New Look for Levels,Back to the 80's with Ataris looking levels

Eletronic Rhythm-Play before the end, Electronic Rhythm is a mode with electronic music while changing color

More than 40 new songs

10 thousand more lives

score boost to be able to reach 10 thousand to pass levels
